target.title: docs: add Sakana AI provider detail page
target.body:
## Summary

Adds `docs/sakana.md`, the provider reference page for Sakana AI. This fills a gap left after #1774 merged the Sakana provider implementation in June 2026.

All other active providers that ship with a settings UI have a detail page in `docs/`; Sakana AI was the only one missing. The page covers setup, the manual Cookie auth flow, data source, parsed quota windows (5-hour and weekly), CLI usage, error table, and related files.

## Details

- Fills the missing `docs/sakana.md` entry to match the pattern for other providers.
- Content derived from `SakanaProviderDescriptor.swift`, `SakanaUsageFetcher.swift`, `SakanaSettingsReader.swift`, `SakanaProviderImplementation.swift`, and existing test fixtures.
- No code, config, or runtime behavior changes; docs only.
- PR #1783 (open) handles the `docs/providers.md` count update, strategy table row, and `## Sakana AI` section; a `Details:` link can be added there once both land.

## Validation

- `node Scripts/check-documentation-links.mjs` — documentation links OK: 134 local links
- `node Scripts/check-site-locales.mjs` — app/site locales OK
- `node Scripts/generate-llms.mjs --check` — llms index OK
- `node Scripts/check-app-locales.mjs --test` — locale tests OK
- `bash Scripts/lint.sh lint-linux` — 0 violations, 0 serious in 1195 files
- `git diff --check` — clean
target.author: kiranmagic7
